AboutPage.title: Bani Risset
AboutPage.subtitle: Digital & AI Consultant
AboutPage.bio: Budi Rissetyabudi Darma Adi, known as Bani Risset, is a Digital & AI Consultant with 18 years / since 2008 building digital systems for businesses and NGOs — including websites, LMS platforms, WhatsApp automation, and AI strategy. He is the founder of 5 NGOs in health and advocacy, as well as founder of 3 businesses and startups.

achievements.kemenkes: Built a health application adopted by the Ministry of Health of Indonesia (2014) — won the MDG's Award
achievements.ngo: Founded 5 NGOs in health and advocacy
achievements.systems: Built and maintained 100+ digital systems per year
achievements.certified: Officially certified by Google, Meta, and PARA
